title: Rhynchelythrum longisetum
taxonomy: Rhynchelythrum longisetum is classified as a species within the plant family Compositae, also known as Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Heliantheae and is further categorized as a member of the subtribe Ecliptinae. The genus Rhynchelythrum is part of the larger group of flowering plants in the kingdom Plantae. This classification places Rhynchelythrum longisetum among the daisy family, which is characterized by the presence of composite flower heads. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
